sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10303" key="a)ntiparhgore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπαρ-ηγορέω</orth>, <sense id="n10303.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">persuade, comfort in turn,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.118a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
